title: Ultimate PVP
description: Umtimate PVP Pack is for everyone who does´t want to browse through hunderts of texture packs
body:
This resource pack is specially made for PVP. 


It has all the usual features:
  - smaller swords
  - low poly blocks
  - new breaking animation
  - new particles
  - no pumpkin blur
  - low fire
  - transparent GUI

The ressource pack is inspired by some different ressource packs and some of you may see this but I´ve reworked the textures. The focus of the resource pack is on simplicity, as everything is in one place. Right now the ressource pack only works in 1.8.x but I will try to fix this and add the newer versions.
